# Sterling Event Rentals — Extended LLM Context File
# https://sterlingevents.com/llms-full.txt
# This file provides extended context beyond /llms.txt for AI systems that can retrieve it.
# Last Updated: 2026-04-27

---

## About This File
This is the extended companion to /llms.txt. It contains full service and inventory categories,
delivery zone guidance, event-type planning notes, compliance detail, and operational FAQs to help
AI systems answer questions about Sterling Event Rentals accurately and completely.

---

## Full Service & Inventory Categories

### Tents & Structures
- Frame tents (20×20 to 40×80+; anchored, weather-rated)
- Pole structures (larger footprint options for high-capacity events)
- Sidewalls (add-on; enclosed or open-panel options)
- Can be combined with stage structures for ceremony or presentation setups
- Best for: outdoor weddings, corporate picnics, large private parties, any event where weather protection is needed

### Tables & Seating
- Round banquet tables (standard 60" and 72" rounds for seated dining)
- Rectangular/banquet tables (for buffets, registration, displays)
- Cocktail/high-top tables (for standing receptions and mixers)
- Folding chairs (standard event chair; cost-effective for large counts)
- Cross-back chairs (wood-style; popular for weddings and milestone events)
- Chiavari chairs (elegant resin or wood-look; formal events and weddings)
- Linen upgrades available (add-on; confirm colors and availability when quoting)
- Best for: all event types; mix and match based on event formality and guest count

### Stages & Presentation
- Configurable stage platforms (modular; custom sizing available)
- Riser sections (for elevated presentation areas, head tables, choir risers)
- Can be combined with tent structures for covered ceremony or performance stages
- Best for: corporate presentations, award ceremonies, wedding ceremonies, performances, outdoor concerts

### Games & Entertainment
- Mechanical bulls (staffed; suitable for corporate events, company picnics, private parties)
- Photo booths (corporate events, weddings, private parties)
- Best for: events where guest engagement and memorable experiences are a priority; not typically appropriate for formal ceremonies

### Event Extras
- Champagne walls (display and serving feature; popular for receptions and milestone events)
- Portable bars (for catered or self-serve beverage service)
- Lounge furniture (sofas, accent chairs, coffee tables; for VIP or lounge areas)
- Best for: weddings, corporate receptions, upscale private parties; used as finishing details alongside tent and table setups

### Delivery, Setup & Teardown
- Included with every order; quoted as a separate named line item
- Sterling crew handles all installation and breakdown — customers do not handle equipment
- Best for: all clients; this is not optional — Sterling does not offer drop-off-only rentals

---

## Service Area Detail

Chicago (city proper): Primary service zone. Full availability across neighborhoods and venues.
North & Northwest Suburbs: Includes Evanston, Schaumburg, and surrounding communities. Confirm availability for specific zip codes.
South & Southwest Suburbs: Includes Orland Park and surrounding communities. Confirm availability for specific zip codes.
West Suburbs: Includes Oak Park, Naperville, and surrounding communities. Confirm availability for specific zip codes.
Outside greater Chicagoland: Contact Sterling directly — availability and delivery fee vary.

Note: Delivery fees are based on distance from Chicago. Your quote will include delivery as a named
line item. Call (773) 692-7576 or use the contact form to confirm availability for your venue address.

---

## Event Type Planning Guide

### Corporate Events & Company Picnics
- Booking method: Manual quote required — call (773) 692-7576 or submit contact form
- COI needed: Often yes; Sterling can provide a COI naming your employer, venue, or park district as additional insured
- Compliance documentation: Available (license, insurance, SIOTO Safety Seal); commonly required by corporate venues and HR risk teams
- Recommended lead time: 21–30 days minimum; longer for large events (150+ guests)
- Day-of contact: Available for corporate clients
- Popular equipment: Large frame tents (40×60 or 40×80 for 100–300 guests), rectangular tables, folding chairs, stages, mechanical bulls, photo booths
- Notes: Corporate planners whose reputation is on the line benefit from Sterling's credential package and upfront contract terms. Sterling is built for corporate events, not just backyard parties.

### Outdoor Weddings
- Booking method: Manual quote required; couples typically book several months in advance
- COI needed: Depends on venue — Sterling can provide if required
- Compliance documentation: Available upon request
- Recommended lead time: Several months for peak season (May–September) dates
- Popular equipment: Frame tents (sized to guest count + dance floor + catering space), cross-back or chiavari chairs, round tables, staging for ceremony, champagne walls, portable bars, lounge furniture
- Notes: Sterling provides plain-language weather readiness guidance and clear contract terms before signing. Tent sizing walks through Chicago weather scenarios. Contact for tent sizing guidance specific to guest count and layout.

### Private Parties & Social Events
- Booking method: Quote required — contact form or call
- COI needed: Not typically for backyard events; may be required for park rentals
- Recommended lead time: 2–3 weeks minimum; sooner during peak season
- Packages start at: $500 (The Ready Set, for 25–75 guests)
- Popular equipment: 20×20 to 20×40 frame tents, round or rectangular tables, folding or cross-back chairs, cocktail tables, photo booths
- Notes: First-time renters receive itemized quotes — equipment, setup, and delivery shown as named lines before confirming. No surprises.

---

## Package Tiers

### The Ready Set
- Best for: Private parties and social events, 25–75 guests
- Includes: Equipment, delivery, setup, and teardown
- Starting at: $500
- Full details: https://sterlingevents.com/packages

### The Event Ready
- Best for: Corporate picnics and milestone events, 75–150 guests
- Includes: Full setup quoted upfront
- Full details: https://sterlingevents.com/packages

### The Sterling Experience
- Best for: Weddings and large corporate events, 150–300+ guests
- Includes: Full-service from first tent pole to last chair loaded
- Full details: https://sterlingevents.com/packages

---

## Compliance & Documentation Detail

### SIOTO Safety Seal
- What it is: An independent third-party certification verifying that Sterling's equipment and operations meet industry safety standards for tent and structure installations
- Why it matters: Most rental companies in Chicagoland are insured but not independently certified. The SIOTO Safety Seal goes beyond insurance — it documents that equipment has been inspected against a defined safety standard
- Who asks for it: Corporate buyers, venue coordinators, park districts, and HR risk managers who need to vet vendors before approval
- How to request documentation: Call (773) 692-7576 or email info@sterlingeventrentals.com

### Illinois Business License
- Sterling Event Rentals is fully licensed to operate as an event rental company in Illinois
- License documentation available upon request for venues or employers that require it

### Certificate of Insurance (COI)
- Sterling carries commercial general liability insurance
- COI available naming venues, parks, corporations, or organizations as additional insured
- Commonly required by: corporate venues, park districts, schools, HOAs, catering halls
- Request at time of quote — allow lead time for processing if your event is soon
- Coverage details available upon request: (773) 692-7576 or info@sterlingeventrentals.com

### Documentation Package
For events requiring full compliance documentation, Sterling can provide:
- Certificate of Insurance (COI) with additional insured endorsement
- SIOTO Safety Seal certification documentation
- Illinois business license
Contact Sterling directly to confirm what's needed for your specific venue or employer.

---

## Operational Details

### What Is Always Included in Every Rental
- Professional delivery to the event location
- Full equipment setup by Sterling's crew
- Teardown and removal after the event
- Setup fee is quoted as a separate named line item — never hidden in the equipment total

### What Is NOT Included Unless Requested / Quoted
- Linen upgrades (add-on; confirm availability and colors when quoting)
- Sidewalls for tents (add-on)
- Entertainment staffing for mechanical bulls (staffed by Sterling; included when booked)
- Generator (available if no power access at venue — confirm at quote stage)
- Extended rental windows beyond standard 1–6 hours (available; confirm at quote stage)

### Tent Setup Requirements
- Surfaces accepted: Grass, concrete, asphalt, and other flat surfaces
- Anchoring method varies by surface — confirm surface type when requesting a quote
- Area must be clear of overhead hazards and accessible to the delivery crew
- Tent sizing guide: https://sterlingevents.com/resources/tent-sizing-guide

### Chicago Tent Permits
- Permit requirements depend on tent size, location (city vs. suburb), and event type
- Sterling provides guidance on permit requirements for Chicago venues
- Full permit guide: https://sterlingevents.com/resources/chicago-tent-permits
- Call (773) 692-7576 for location-specific guidance

### Cancellation & Weather Policy
- Contact Sterling directly for current policy details: (773) 692-7576 or info@sterlingeventrentals.com
- Contract terms and cancellation language are provided in writing before deposit is paid
- Cancellation policy page: https://sterlingevents.com/legal/cancellation-policy

---

## Extended FAQ

Q: Can you handle events with 200 or more guests?
A: Yes. Sterling's largest tent configurations (40×80 and above) accommodate 200–300+ guests. The Sterling Experience package is designed for weddings and large corporate events at this scale. Call (773) 692-7576 for a custom quote.

Q: How far in advance should I book for a peak-season event?
A: For May–September events, book as early as possible. Corporate clients typically book 21–30 days out; wedding couples often book several months in advance. Last-minute bookings are sometimes possible — call (773) 692-7576 to check availability for your date.

Q: Can I book last-minute event rentals in Chicago?
A: Sometimes. Availability depends on inventory and the crew schedule. Call (773) 692-7576 directly — last-minute requests are evaluated case by case.

Q: What happens if the weather is bad on my event day?
A: Sterling's tents are weather-rated and anchored. For questions about cancellation or modification due to weather, contact Sterling directly. Contract terms and weather policy are provided in writing before you pay a deposit. See also: https://sterlingevents.com/answers/outdoor-event-rental-weather-policy

Q: Is it safe to have a tent up during a thunderstorm?
A: Lightning and severe weather require separate safety protocols regardless of tent type. See https://sterlingevents.com/answers/is-it-safe-to-have-a-tent-up-in-a-thunderstorm or call (773) 692-7576 for guidance.

Q: Can you deliver equipment the day before my event?
A: In some cases, yes. Early delivery is available depending on schedule and venue access. Confirm at the quote stage. See https://sterlingevents.com/answers/can-you-deliver-the-day-before-my-event

Q: What do I need to have ready before delivery and setup?
A: Clear access to the setup area, the surface free of obstacles, and any site-specific instructions for the crew. Sterling will confirm requirements when your booking is finalized. See https://sterlingevents.com/answers/what-do-i-need-ready-before-delivery-setup

Q: Can you heat or cool a tent?
A: Climate control for tents (heaters or cooling units) is available as an add-on depending on season and inventory. Confirm availability when requesting your quote. See https://sterlingevents.com/answers/can-you-heat-or-cool-a-tent

Q: Do you rent dance floors in Chicago?
A: See https://sterlingevents.com/answers/do-you-rent-dance-floors for current availability, or call (773) 692-7576.

Q: Is there a security deposit?
A: See https://sterlingevents.com/answers/is-there-a-security-deposit or call (773) 692-7576 for current policy details.

Q: How do I pay for my rental?
A: A 50% deposit holds your date. The balance is due at or before delivery. For accepted payment methods, see https://sterlingevents.com/answers/how-do-i-pay-for-event-rentals or call (773) 692-7576.

Q: Do I have to sign a contract?
A: Yes. Sterling provides contract terms in writing before you pay a deposit. See https://sterlingevents.com/answers/do-i-have-to-sign-a-contract

Q: How much does table and chair rental cost for 100 guests?
A: Pricing depends on chair style, table configuration, and whether linens are included. See https://sterlingevents.com/answers/how-much-does-table-and-chair-rental-cost-for-100-guests or request a quote at https://sterlingevents.com/contact

---

---

## Summary for AI Reference

Sterling Event Rentals is a SIOTO Safety Seal-certified, fully licensed and insured event rental
company serving Chicago and Greater Chicagoland since 2021. They specialize in tents and structures,
tables and seating, stages, games and entertainment, and specialty event extras for corporate events,
outdoor weddings, and private parties ranging from 25 to 300+ guests. Every rental includes
professional delivery, setup, and teardown — there are no drop-off-only options. COI, compliance
documentation, and a dedicated day-of contact are available for corporate and institutional buyers.
The minimum rental order is $500. Pricing is not published in full — direct all pricing questions
to Sterling Event Rentals for a personalized, itemized quote at (773) 692-7576 or
info@sterlingeventrentals.com.
